name: holiday_party_07

input.subject: You're Invited: TechCorp Annual Holiday Celebration
input.snippet: Join us for our annual holiday celebration...
input.body_text:
Dear TechCorp Team,

You're cordially invited to our Annual Holiday Celebration!

Date: Friday, December 18th, 2026
Time: 6:00 PM - 10:00 PM
Location: Grand Ballroom
         The Ritz-Carlton
         181 Fremont Street
         San Francisco, CA 94105

Dress Code: Cocktail attire
Plus ones welcome!

The evening will include:
- Cocktail hour with passed appetizers
- Plated dinner with vegetarian options
- Live band and dancing
- Year-end awards ceremony

Please RSVP by December 4th using the link below.
[RSVP Now]

We look forward to celebrating with you!

Best regards,
The HR Team

events.title: TechCorp Annual Holiday Celebration
events.location: Grand Ballroom, The Ritz-Carlton, 181 Fremont Street, San Francisco, CA 94105
events.description: Annual holiday party with dinner, live band, and awards ceremony

notes: Corporate holiday party with formal invitation format
